mapper.select:
select * from article_stats where article_id in
#{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `article_stats` (article_id, view_count, updated_time) VALUES
(#{item.articleId}, #{item.viewCount}, #{item.updatedTime})
AS new ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE view_count = article_stats.view_count + new.view_count, updated_time = new.updated_time
